title: Immunohistochemistry (immunostaining cultured rat hippocampal neurons) from Yao CK et al. (2017)
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"90udb","text":"To stain for Synaptophysin and mFwe2-HA in presynaptic compartments, the cells were permeabilized with 100% methanol at -20°C for 15 min. 1XPBS solution was used for all staining steps. Primary antibody dilutions used: rabbit anti-GFP, 1:500 (Invitrogen); guinea pig ant-m/ratFwe2 (GP67), 1: 100. rabbit anti-GM130, 1:500 (Adcam); mouse anti-HA, 1:200 (Sigma); mouse anti-SVP38, 1:200 (Sigma). Secondary antibodies were diluted in 1:500 (Jackson ImmunoResearch and Invitrogen). DAPI was used in 1: 2000 (Invitrogen). Images processing was achieved using LSM Zen.","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4arfe","text":" ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: To stain for ratFwe2 in cell body, rinse DIV14 neurons cultured in 12-well plate with 1XPBS solution.
Fix them in 4% paraformaldehyde/4% sucrose/1XPBS solution for 10 min at room temperature. 00:10:00
Permeabilize the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 20 min at room temperature on a horizontal shaker. (1/3) 00:20:00
Permeabilize the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 20 min at room temperature on a horizontal shaker. (2/3) 00:20:00
Permeabilize the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 20 min at room temperature on a horizontal shaker. (3/3) 00:20:00
Block further with 10% BSA/0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 1 h. 01:00:00
To reduce non-specific staining, absorb anti-m/ratFwe2 antibodies with paraformaldehyde-fixed n2a cells before staining.
Dilute primary antibodies in 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution.
Incubate the cells with this staining solution at least for 8 h at 4°C. 08:00:00
Wash the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 5 min at room temperature on a rotator. (1/3) 00:05:00
Wash the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 5 min at room temperature on a rotator. (2/3) 00:05:00
Wash the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 5 min at room temperature on a rotator. (3/3) 00:05:00
Dilute secondary antibodies in 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution.
Incubate the cells with this staining solution at least for 2 h at room temperature on a rotator. 02:00:00
Wash the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 5 min at room temperature on a rotator. (1/3) 00:05:00
Wash the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 5 min at room temperature on a rotator. (2/3) 00:05:00
Wash the cells with 0.1% Tween-20-containing 1XPBS solution for 5 min at room temperature on a rotator. (3/3) 00:05:00
Replace the wash solution with glycerol-containing mounting medium.
Mount the cells were further with glycerol-containing mounting medium.
creator: Chi-Kuang Yao
